sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48765" key="qhriotrofei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θηριοτροφ-εῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n48765.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">park where wild beasts are kept</tr_>, Hortens. in Varro <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">RR</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.13.2</biblScope> </bibl> (<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thero-</tr_> codd.).</sense> </entryFree>
